ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport the team plays */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game is part of */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "playoff_game" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game is a playoff game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* JSON object containing weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the team has played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the standings are for */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Team's rank within their division */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Team's rank within their conference */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (points for - points against) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "stats" TEXT /* JSON object containing player statistics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the player statistics are for */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  "draft_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing draft information */,
  "performance_trend" TEXT /* JSON object containing performance trends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game is scheduled for */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game will be played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the schedule is for */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, postponed, canceled) */,
  "broadcast_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing broadcast information */,
  "ticket_info" TEXT /* JSON object containing ticket information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
